steps: Deparaffinize and hydrate to distilled water
Preheat Alkaline Alcohol in 60 degree oven
Mordant in Bouins in microwave, covered, at Med power for 45 seconds. Let sit for 10 mins. (Do Not Dump)
Rinse in cold running water for 10 minutes
Sodium Thiosulfate for 5 minutes, wash for 5 minutes under cold running water
Stain in 1% Alcian Blue for 20 minutes (Do Not Dump)
Cold running water for 2-5 minutes
Place in preheated Alkaline Alcohol for 10 minutes. (in oven)
Cold running water for 2-5 minutes
Place in Movat’s Weigerts for 60 minutes (Do not Microwave)
Wash briefly in cold running water; rinse well in distilled water
Place in Crocein Scarlet/Acid Fuchsin for 1 min
Rinse in distilled water
Place in 5% Phosphotungstic Acid for 5 min
Transfer directly to 1% Acetic Acid for 5 minutes
Rinse well in distilled water
Dehydrate in 1 change of 95% ETOH, 2 changes of 100% ETOH 1 minute each
Alcoholic Saffron for 20 minutes (Do Not Dump)
Rinse in 2 changes of 100% ETOH for 1 minute each
Clear in histoclear (xylene) and mount
creator: Lili Liang
